# Project Instructions
## Overview
This project is a React application using Vite as the build tool and shadcnUI for components

## shadcnUI
The librairy is already set up in the project. To install components, you can use the command:
``` pnpm dlx shadcn@latest add <component-name> ```
We already are in the desired directory, so you can run this command directly in the terminal.
